title: Imposition of monetary penalty: Colorcon Limited
body: "OFSI imposed a penalty of £152,750 on a UK registered company, Colorcon Limited (“Colorcon”), in accordance with section 146 of the Policing and Crime Act 2017. The penalty concerns breaches by Colorcon of regulation 12 of the Russia  (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (the “Russia Regulations”). "
